$comment: Safe-acquisition manifest for external terminal conformance / test / fuzz-seed corpora used alongside this PoC corpus. Policy (see README.md): apt-first (signed Debian repo); else clone a git repo pinned to a REVIEWED commit SHA (never a mutable branch/tag; GitHub tag signatures are web-flow -> reject); verify a real maintainer GPG fingerprint out-of-band where one exists (only vttest offers this). SHAs below are the HEAD at manifest time -- REVIEW the pinned commit before trusting it.

suites.notes: Debian signed repo is the safe path. Tarball is PGP-signed by Thomas E. Dickey; verify the fingerprint out-of-band. Use the bare invisible-island.net host (www cert mismatch).
apt for the library; git (pinned) only if the packaged tests are absent. Doubles as a known-good reference parser for differential testing.
Maintained neovim fork (avoid the dormant upstream Bazaar). git only for the t/ conformance tests.
No apt package. Most thorough automated assertion-based conformance suite. Reject any web-flow tag sig; rely on the pinned SHA (same author as vttest/xterm/ncurses).
src/terminal unit tests + /test acceptance cases -- the most aggressive real-world edge-case set. Case data is language-agnostic (Zig only needed to run in-tree).
Parser fuzz targets -- the memory-safety/DoS layer.
Curated fuzz seed corpus for the parser.
Throughput / DoS stress only. A payload GENERATOR -- run it in the sandbox, never cat its output.
Behaviour tables snapshot -- reference DATA only, not executed.
